Name: FSoundClassProperties
Description: Structure containing configurable properties of a sound class.

Variables.Name: StereoBleed
Variables.Description: The amount of stereo sounds to bleed to the rear speakers

Variables.Name: LFEBleed
Variables.Description: The amount of a sound to bleed to the LFE channel

Variables.Name: VoiceCenterChannelVolume
Variables.Description: Voice center channel volume - Not a multiplier (no propagation)

Variables.Name: RadioFilterVolume
Variables.Description: Volume of the radio filter effect

Variables.Name: RadioFilterVolumeThreshold
Variables.Description: Volume at which the radio filter kicks in

Variables.Name: bApplyEffects
Variables.Description: Sound mix voice - whether to apply audio effects

Variables.Name: bAlwaysPlay
Variables.Description: Whether to artificially prioritise the component to play

Variables.Name: bIsUISound
Variables.Description: Whether or not this sound plays when the game is paused in the UI

Variables.Name: bIsMusic
Variables.Description: Whether or not this is music (propagates only if parent is true)

Variables.Name: bReverb
Variables.Description: Whether or not this sound class has reverb applied

Variables.Name: Default2DReverbSendAmount
Variables.Description: Amount of audio to send to master reverb effect for 2D sounds played with this sound class.

Variables.Name: bCenterChannelOnly
Variables.Description: Whether or not this sound class forces sounds to the center channel

Variables.Name: bApplyAmbientVolumes
Variables.Description: Whether the InteriorExterior volume and LPF modifiers should be applied

Variables.Name: OutputTarget
Variables.Description: Which output target the sound should be played through
